title: IComforting MiddleEastern Sweetened Condensed Milk Fatteh
description: A herbal, bouncy-qq, comforting middle-eastern dish featuring sweetened condensed milk, spherify in a low-sodium-friendly fatteh. Perfect for a warm and cozy dinner.
instructions: In a mixing bowl, combine sweetened condensed milk, almond flour, pomegranate juice, vanilla extract, cooking oil, mixed herbs (oregano and parsley), baking soda, and nutritional yeast.
Stir until all ingredients are fully incorporated and the mixture thickens and reaches a thick pudding-like consistency.
Cook at 190°C for 30 minutes or until golden brown. Remove from heat and let it cool slightly before spherifying with a cooking emulsifier or cornstarch solution to achieve a bouncy texture.
Serve chilled as a fatteh, garnished with fresh herbs.
